---
title: "Educational Innovation"
lang: en
---

## Orientation

::: {.section-intro}
Educational innovation is used here for a focused purpose: designing active, reproducible, and supported learning environments where digital tools support understanding rather than replacing it.
:::

My projects are organized around three priorities: modernizing courses with open technologies, structuring student support, and integrating artificial intelligence within supervised teaching settings.

## Main projects

::: {.resource-grid}
::: {.resource-card}
::: {.eyebrow}
Courses
:::

### Redesign of data science courses

Revision of introductory data science and scientific programming courses to strengthen case studies, practice with R and Quarto, and reproducible reporting.

Goals: contextualize learning, develop francophone case studies, provide formative feedback, and make workflows more explicit.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
::: {.eyebrow}
Student success
:::

### Training and resources for teaching assistants

Development of a support model for teaching assistants and an internal platform gathering shared resources, short videos, and procedures.

[Teaching assistant space - internal platform](https://ulavaldti.sharepoint.com/sites/AuxiliaireduDMS){.btn .btn-outline-dark}
:::

::: {.resource-card}
::: {.eyebrow}
Supervised AI
:::

### GPT-CDA project

Development of a specialized conversational assistant to support reasoning in mathematics and statistics, use course notation, and redirect students to a human tutor when human support is preferable.

::: {.link-list}
[Project page](cda/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-dark}
[ULaval News article](https://nouvelles.ulaval.ca/2026/05/22/le-gpt-cda-un-robot-conversationnel-qui-epaule-les-etudiantes-et-etudiants-dans-les-cours-de-mathematiques-et-de-statistique-66c35c61-4649-41a0-befb-c2f79036ac30){.btn .btn-outline-dark}
:::
:::

::: {.resource-card}
::: {.eyebrow}
Open resources
:::

### site_ressources_SSD platform

Online library of Quarto templates, interactive tutorials, reproducible examples, GitHub procedures, and resources for data science teaching.

[site_ressources_SSD](https://aureliennicosiaulaval.github.io/site_ressources_SSD/){.btn .btn-outline-dark}
:::

::: {.resource-card}
::: {.eyebrow}
Educational software
:::

### tutorizeR

R package that automates conversion of `.qmd` or `.Rmd` documents into interactive tutorials for `learnr` or `quarto-live`, with conversion reports and feedback mechanisms.

::: {.link-list}
[Dedicated page](packages/tutorizeR.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-dark}
[GitHub](https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/tutorizeR){.btn .btn-outline-dark}
[CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/tutorizeR/index.html){.btn .btn-outline-dark}
:::
:::

:::

## Interactive tutorials

Interactive tutorials built with `learnr` allow students to manipulate R code in a guided environment with exercises and feedback.

::: {.link-list}
[BIXI tutorial](https://aureliennicosia.shinyapps.io/TutorielBixi/){.btn .btn-outline-dark}
[ggplot2 tutorial](https://aureliennicosia.shinyapps.io/TutorielGGplot/){.btn .btn-outline-dark}
:::

## Art, mathematics, and data

The Digital Drawing with R project explores the graphical potential of R and `ggplot2` for producing generative images based on statistical processes. This work connects visualization, creative programming, and reproducible resources.

## Outreach

I regularly share my practices in conferences and workshops devoted to university teaching, data science, and open digital tools.

- [SSC 2026 - AI and teaching workshop](https://aureliennicosiaulaval.github.io/ssc-2026-ai-teaching-gallery/): public gallery of prompts, teaching activities, AI-use rules, and reusable verification routines.
- [EIOM 2025 - Statistical modeling workshops](https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/EIOM_2025) and [website](https://aureliennicosiaulaval.github.io/EIOM_2025/).
- [ASSQ 2025 - What is new in data science?](https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/ASSQ_E25).

::: {.highlight-strip}
Guiding principle: connect statistical rigor, student autonomy, and reproducible resources.
:::
